name: Orange-Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, ground cinnamon, and salt.
2. Add nuts and orange peel to the dry ingredients; mix lightly until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and stir in milk, oil, and brown sugar until smooth.
4. Make a well in the dry mixture and pour in the egg mixture gradually.
5. Mix quickly just until the dry ingredients are moistened and no lumps remain.
6. Spoon batter into greased muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
